title: NPC Autopilot v3.7.0
description: Foundry VTT NPC combat autopilot. v3.7.0: Spellcasting AI (pick best spell by archetype, AoE clustering, concentration respect), Action Economy (Dash, Dodge, Shove, Grapple, Help, object interaction), Auto-Reactions (Shield, Opportunity Attack), Auto-Legendary Actions, Friendly Support (buff priority, rescue, Sneak Attack combos), GM Controls (narrative mode, per-NPC override panel, blacklist, pause/resume). v3.6.0: Archetype-aware tactics.
